YieldMax® Introduces Option Income Strategy ETF on Hims & Hers Health Inc. (HIMS)

holdings.infoBox: HIYY is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax HIMS Option Income Strategy ETF (HIYY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund seeks to provide current income and capped gains on the Hims & Hers Health, Inc. stock (HIMS) through a synthetic covered call strategy, collateralized by cash and US Treasurys HIYY was launched on Sep 22, 2025 and is issued by YieldMax.
